legal_framework.surveillance_law: USA PATRIOT Act § 215 / FISA Amendments Act

real_world_references: NSA PRISM program (revealed 2013): collected data from Google, Apple, Facebook, Microsoft and others
Palantir ICE contract: $49M contract for 'Investigative Case Management' system tracking immigrants
Clearview AI: scraped 30 billion photos from social media, sold to 3,100 law enforcement agencies
Section 702 FISA: allows warrantless surveillance of non-US persons and incidental collection of Americans
